title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind announces Gemini 3 with upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use capabilities. The presentation focuses on enabling developers to build and scale agentic applications using these new features in Vertex AI.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech presents Gemini 3 from Google DeepMind, covering upgraded model reasoning, an expanded context window, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The focus is on enabling developers to build and scale agentic applications with these features in Vertex AI. The takeaways: longer-context reasoning, stronger multimodal tool use, and multi-agent capabilities aimed at production deployment.
